channel.title: Tech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nearly half of xAI’s founding team has now left the company
item.description: Whatever the cause of the departures, the cumulative impact is alarming. There is a lot of work left to do at xAI, and an IPO will bring more scrutiny...

item.title: Boston Dynamics CEO Robert Playter steps down after 30 years at the company
item.description: Robert Playter announcd he is leaving Boston Dynamics after 30 years at the company in various roles, including six years as CEO.

item.title: Google sent personal and financial information of student journalist to ICE
item.description: The tech giant handed over the personal information of a journalist and student who attended a pro-Palestinian protest in 2024. This is the latest exa...

item.title: VC Masha Bucher, Epstein associate and Day One founder, explains herself
item.description: After numerous news reports documented Masha Bucher's close business and personal relationship with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, Bucher too...

item.title: Trump EPA reportedly seeks to revoke landmark air pollution rule
item.description: EPA administrator Lee Zeldin is reportedly expected to repeal the 2009 "endangerment finding" that underpins U.S. climate regulatory efforts.

item.title: Here’s how Rivian changed the rear door manual release on the R2
item.description: Rivian, along with other automakers, has been under pressure to make the manual door releases easier to access. The new R2 SUV does that — here's how.

item.title: Vega raises $120M Series B to rethink how enterprises detect cyber threats
item.description: Vega Security raised $120 million Series B, bringing its valuation to $700 million, in a round led by Accel. The company aims to rethink how enterpris...

item.title: YouTubers aren’t relying on ad revenue anymore — here’s how some are diversifying
item.description: YouTubers are no longer just creators, and in some cases, their side businesses are growing faster than their channels.

item.title: Google expands tools to let users remove sensitive data about themselves from Search
item.description: Users will be able to more easily request the removal of results that include private information or non-consensual explicit imagery.

item.title: What to know about Netflix’s landmark acquisition of Warner Bros.
item.description: Learn more about Netflix's acquisition of Warner Bros., considered the most historic megadeal in Hollywood, as it continues to develop.
